digest.component_or_area: rebar plan-review project portability criterion and Pass-4 coaching
propositions: Add an activated project plan-review criterion project.portability that runs in Pass 1 at both container and leaf scope to flag plans baking rebar-project assumptions into reusable behavior.

The finder emits a portability finding only when it supplies all four elements: plan citation, a materially different supported client shape, the causal failure mechanism, and a specific observable breakage scenario.
Silence about portability and specialization kept in project configuration or an explicit extension boundary are must-not-fire cases.
Add a project-specific Pass-4 coaching move project-portability that applies only when project.portability survives review and renders a locked project template without adding a generic core move.
A balanced three-run live evaluation must demonstrate all four concrete portability failures with full recall, zero false-accepts, and stable agreement thresholds.
Existing plan-review behavior including Pass 2 adjudication and Pass 3 decisions remains unchanged, and overlay-absent clients see no behavior change.
